samples.xml_description: Implement an unsigned 16-bit multiplier using shift and accumulate operations. Clock signal. Active-low reset signal. Chip enable signal to initiate multiplication. Multiplicand input. Multiplier input. Product output. Completion flag indicating the end of multiplication. Shift count register, 0 to 16. Update shift count register. if (!rst_n) begin i <= 0; end else if (start & i < 17) begin i <= i + 1; end else if (!start) begin i <= 0; end Update completion flag. if (!rst_n) begin done_r <= 0; end else if (i == 16) begin done_r <= 1; end else if (i == 17) begin done_r <= 0; end Update product register. if (!rst_n) begin yout_r <= 0; areg <= 0; breg <= 0; end else if (start) begin if (i == 0) begin areg <= ain; breg <= bin; end else if (i < 17 & areg[i-1]) begin yout_r <= yout_r + (breg << (i-1)); end end Reset registers. Start multiplication on start signal. Increment shift count register i on every clock cycle. Update product register yout_r on shift count i < 17 and areg[i-1] is high. Set done_r flag on shift count i == 16.
